add_params.name: Action
add_params.description: Query param for Remove|Resume|Suspend actions on existing requests. Not sent by this form.

add_params.name: Identity
add_params.description: Existing restore request identity for Remove/Resume/Suspend. Not sent by this form.

add_params.name: TenantFilter
add_params.description: Formatter sends as 'TenantFilter' (capital T). PS1 reads $Request.Body.TenantFilter.

add_params.name: SourceMailbox
add_params.description: Formatter sends ExchangeGuid from addedFields if present, otherwise UPN. PS1 reads .value ?? raw value. NOTE: formatter pre-resolves to ExchangeGuid string, so PS1 receives the guid directly.

add_params.name: TargetMailbox
add_params.description: Same as SourceMailbox — ExchangeGuid or UPN string.

add_params.name: AssociatedMessagesCopyOption
add_params.description: Enum: DoNotCopy|MapByMessageClass|Copy. PS1 reads .value from the object.

add_params.name: ExcludeFolders
add_params.description: Array of folder specifiers e.g. '#Inbox#'. PS1 reads .value from array items.

add_params.name: IncludeFolders
add_params.description: Array of folder specifiers. PS1 reads .value from array items.

notes: customDataformatter: sends TenantFilter (capital T, from ambient tenant), pre-resolves SourceMailbox and TargetMailbox to ExchangeGuid (from addedFields) if available (otherwise UPN). All other fields pass through with the same names. PS1 receives these fields as body params. Note: PS1 also reads .value from AssociatedMessagesCopyOption, ConflictResolutionOption, TargetType, ExcludeFolders, IncludeFolders — the formatter sends the full autocomplete objects for these fields (not pre-unwrapped), so the PS1 unwrapping handles it.
